results.snippet: Heat Sinks Heat sinks are thermal management components designed to dissipate heat from high-power electronic devices and prevent overheating. results.title: Heat Sink Extrusions | Advanced Thermal Solutions
results.snippet: The ratio of tall, straight fins to their small footprint base improves thermal performance and saves space. The extruded aluminum minimizes thermal resistance, reduces weight and saves cost over alternative (e.g. copper) heat sinks.
